analysis.excerpt:
PAUL UWAIFO
Lagos, 100001 Nigeria | +2347056610132 | uwaifopaul1@gmail.com
Summary
IT Support Specialist and Frontend Developer with 4+ years of experience in IT infrastructure, network
administration, and modern web development. Proven expertise in React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and
system troubleshooting. Experienced in reducing downtime, resolving technical incidents, and building
scalable, user-focused web applications. Strong background in cloud tools, cybersecurity fundamentals, and
digital transformation.
Technical Skills
• Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Redux Toolkit,
Zustand, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
• Backend: Node.js, Express.js, RESTful APIs, EJS Templating
• Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, TypeORM, Redis (for caching and session
management)
• Tools & DevOps: Git, GitHub, npm, Webpack, Postman, TablePlus, cPanel, DirectAdmin,
Agile Methodologies
• Other: Responsive Design, Cross-Browser Compatibility, Performance Optimization, AI
Integration (OpenAI, Anthropic), Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), WebRTC, Three.js
• IT Infrastructure: Network Administration, System Testing, Hardware Repair, Zoho
Workspace, Spiceworks, Microsoft Office SuiteTools, Odoo ERP, Git, GitHub, npm, Webpack,
Postman, TablePlus
